item.title: Welcome
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the deliberate project!

The project started at the ETHLondon Hackathon in March 2020. The idea was to build decentralized debate platform for rational decision-making based on quadratic voting in a tree of pro and con arguments. This form of democratic decision making is known under the term deliberative democracy.

With the global challenges ahead, this is something the world needs right now. 🌍
So let's be constructive and build a decentralized and democratic future together!
